name: Plum Jam Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. Combine the egg, milk, and oil in another bowl.
4. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients.
5. Stir until just moistened and no flour streaks remain.
6. Spoon the batter into prepared muffin tins, filling each cup 2/3 full.
7. Spread 1 tsp of plum jam into the center of each filled muffin cup.
8. Bake at 375 degrees F for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Serve warm.
